name: Altus Group ARGUS Real Estate Analytics REST API
what_it_does: Altus Group ARGUS commercial real estate analytics REST API for REITs, institutional investors, lenders, appraisers, and CRE professionals to access property valuations, DCF cash flow models, lease analysis, portfolio performance, and market benchmarking — enabling automated commercial real estate valuation, underwriting, loan portfolio monitoring, and investment performance reporting through ARGUS's industry-standard CRE analytics and Altus Market Insights data platform. Enables AI agents to manage property valuation for DCF cash flow model and NOI calculation automation, handle lease analysis for tenant rent roll and lease term extraction automation, access portfolio analytics for REIT and fund performance measurement automation, retrieve appraisal data for market comparable and cap rate automation, manage loan underwriting for CRE debt analysis and covenant tracking automation, handle market data for property market and benchmark analytics automation, access construction cost for hard cost estimation and budget automation, retrieve feasibility for development project pro-forma automation, manage property data for CRE property detail and transaction history automation, and integrate Altus ARGUS with REIT accounting, asset management, and investor reporting systems for CRE analytics automation.
use_cases: Automating property valuation and DCF modeling for real estate investment manager underwriting automation agents
Analyzing lease rent rolls and cash flow projections for CRE lender portfolio monitoring automation agents
Accessing market benchmarking and transaction comparables for real estate appraisal automation agents
Integrating ARGUS property data with portfolio reporting for REIT investor communication automation agents
not_for: Residential real estate (Altus ARGUS is commercial real estate focused, not residential property platforms)
Property management operations (Altus is analytics and valuation, not PM/tenant communications system)
Simple property listing search (Altus is institutional investment analytics, not public property search)
best_when: A REIT, institutional real estate investor, CRE lender, or commercial real estate analyst wanting AI agents to automate property valuations, DCF modeling, lease analysis, portfolio performance, and market benchmarking through Altus ARGUS's industry-standard CRE analytics platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE CLIENT REQUIRED: Altus Group ARGUS is enterprise CRE software; automated open API access assumption creates enterprise_required; automated must be an institutional real estate organization with Altus Group agreement. ARGUS MODELS ARE COMPLEX: ARGUS DCF models have specific assumptions and conventions; automated simplified real estate assumption creates model_configuration_error for ARGUS-specific modeling rules; automated must understand ARGUS Enterprise modeling conventions. DATA LICENSING RESTRICTS USAGE: Altus Market Insights data is licensed for specific use cases; automated unrestricted data redistribution assumption creates data_licensing_violation; automated must comply with Altus data usage license per subscription. PROPERTY DATA COVERAGE IS MARKET-SPECIFIC: Altus market data coverage varies by geography; automated global market data assumption creates no_data_for_market in markets outside Altus coverage; automated must verify Altus data coverage for specific markets.

auth.notes: Altus Group uses API key + OAuth2 for ARGUS REST API. REST API with JSON. Toronto, Canada HQ. Founded 1985. TSX:AIF. Products: ARGUS Enterprise (DCF valuation), ARGUS Developer (dev pro-forma), Altus Market Insights (CRE data), Altus Analytics (portfolio). Industries: REIT, private equity, lending, appraisal. 1,000+ clients globally. ARGUS is CRE industry standard for valuation modeling. Competes with CoStar and MSCI Real Assets for CRE analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial for qualified CRE organizations; production requires Altus enterprise license
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription by module (ARGUS Enterprise, Market Insights, Analytics); user-based pricing
pricing.notes: Toronto CA. TSX:AIF. Annual subscription. CRE analytics market leader. 1,000+ institutional clients.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; valuation and analytics APIs throttled per subscription plan

known_agent_gotchas: ARGUS ENTERPRISE MODELS HAVE SPECIFIC STRUCTURE: ARGUS DCF models follow specific formatting (market leasing assumptions, recovery structures, cap rates); automated generic DCF assumption creates model_validation_error for non-ARGUS structured inputs; automated must understand ARGUS Enterprise model architecture

PROPERTY DATA IS CONTRIBUTED PLUS MODELED: Altus market data combines contributed transactions and modeled estimates; automated certainty assumption creates methodology_footnote for modeled vs. actual transaction data; automated must distinguish modeled from observed market data

PORTFOLIO AGGREGATION REQUIRES STANDARDIZATION: Aggregating multiple ARGUS property models requires consistent assumption sets; automated heterogeneous model aggregation creates inconsistent_portfolio_metrics; automated must standardize key assumptions across portfolio models for comparable aggregation

CRE APPRAISAL HAS REGULATORY STANDARDS: Commercial real estate appraisal must comply with USPAP (US) or RICS (UK); automated non-USPAP valuation assumption creates regulatory_non-compliance for regulated appraisal uses; automated must ensure ARGUS outputs meet applicable appraisal standards

MARKET INSIGHTS DATA HAS UPDATE FREQUENCY: Altus market data updates periodically (monthly/quarterly) not real-time; automated continuous market data assumption creates stale_data for rapidly changing market conditions; automated must understand Altus data publication schedule
agent_readiness.security_notes: CRE analytics. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/CA/EU. Commercial real estate valuation and market data.

security_score_components.security_notes: CRE analytics. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/CA/EU. Property valuation and investment data.
